title: EcoCeres Collaborates with Xiamen Airlines to Advance Sustainable Aviation Fuel Production
content: EcoCeres, Inc. is partnering with Xiamen Airlines to collect and transport waste cooking oil from selected restaurant partners through its established supply chain. The waste oil will be processed at EcoCeresâ€™ production plants to produce high-quality Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF), a drop-in replacement for conventional jet fuel that can significantly reduce lifecycle carbon emissions.
author: Analysts Account
